parsed.generic_mechanism: Breadth of concrete escalation can sustain a long argument; repeatedly returning every example to an already-established frame turns cohesion into drag.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Vivid domestic and social scenes keep widening the argument, while abrupt analogies and promotional assurances occasionally strain control. Despite its polemical excess, most sections introduce a new pressure rather than merely restating the premise.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The governing metaphor clarifies a nuanced distinction, and the everyday vignettes are lucid. However, successive examples follow nearly the same validate-question-defer pattern, after which the test, instruction, and expansive summary repeat conclusions already established.
